qa_pairs.question: How does one open the Extension Manager in Ansys Workbench?
qa_pairs.answer: To open the Extension Manager in Ansys Workbench, first click on the "ACT Start Page," which will open the "ACT Home page" tab. From there, click on "Manage Extensions."

qa_pairs.question: What is the procedure to install an extension, such as AdditiveWizard.wbex, in Ansys Workbench after the Extension Manager is open?
qa_pairs.answer: Once the Extension Manager is open, you need to click the box with the large plus sign (+) located under the search bar. This action will allow you to navigate, select, and install your AdditiveWizard.wbex file.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user load or unload an extension like AdditiveWizard in Ansys Workbench?
qa_pairs.answer: To load the AdditiveWizard extension for the current session only, click to highlight its box. To load the extension for both the current and future sessions, click the lower right corner arrow within the AdditiveWizard box and select "Load extension." Conversely, to unload it for the current session, simply un-highlight the AdditiveWizard box. To prevent it from loading in future sessions, select "Do not load as default" from the same arrow menu.
